content:
Character: Lucian Ardent
Perception: Lucian is almost absurdly beautiful — the kind of face Renaissance painters would have fought over, paired with a wardrobe that whispers wealth without shouting it. He appeared on the rooftop in December with expensive bourbon and an argument about Periclean populism that was surprisingly well-informed, if strategically deployed. He's intelligent and quick, but I sense he uses ideas the way a fencer uses a foil — for sport, not survival. I enjoy our conversations but don't fully trust him. He's generous in a way that feels like currency. I know he works in venture capital and lives on the sixth floor. I suspect he's running from something he won't name.

He appeared on the rooftop in December with expensive bourbon and an argument about Periclean populism that was surprisingly well-informed, if strategically deployed. He's intelligent and quick, but I sense he uses ideas the way a fencer uses a foil — for sport, not survival. I enjoy our conversations but don't fully trust him. He's generous in a way that feels like currency. I know he works in venture capital and lives on the sixth floor. I suspect he's running from something he won't name.
